bio:
Communication Skills Teacher
DM "VOICE" for FREE training
descripcion:
Here's the TOP 5 things you should do to improve your communication skills.

Great public speaking can seem really complex, but the truth is it's just a combination of small behaviors.

1/ Record and review yourself speaking - this helps build self-awareness on your vocal and visual image

2/ Match & mirror people's energy to build rapport and connection

3/ Learn how to pause (most people are afraid to pause because they're afraid of the silence and don't understand the true power of the pause!)

4/ Use the FORD method to never run out of things to say in conversations

5/ End your sentences on a low pitch. This the fastest hack to immediately come across with more certainty and authority when you communicate.

bio:
Welcome to HeartTalk Hub — your space for real conversations about love, relationships, and emotional growth.
   Dm for collaborations
 dannydaxtadi@gmail.com
descripcion:
How you communicate in a relationship says a lot about how you see yourself.

When you know your worth, you stop begging to be understood.  
You speak clearly, calmly, and honestly.  
You express your needs without fear.  
And you stop shrinking yourself just to keep the peace.

Healthy communication is not about winning arguments.  
It’s about creating understanding, safety, and respect.

And self worth?  
It’s built when you stop accepting bare minimum love, mixed signals, and disrespect as normal.

The right relationship will never require you to abandon yourself to keep someone else comfortable.#love #relationships #dating #healthyrelationships #couplegoals

bio: Inspiring Love, Peace, Light & Hope through something as simple as Conversation!
descripcion:
#Communication
#CommunicationSkills
#HealthyCommunication
#EffectiveCommunication
#RelationshipAdvice

This video emphasizes the significance of communication. It’s crucial in all aspects of life, whether in relationships or not. Effective communication breaks down barriers and fosters understanding.

Poor communication leads to tension, disagreements, sadness, anger, and more. This video aims to highlight communication’s importance in human experiences and challenges.

Remember, clear and honest communication is key. Avoid over or under communicating balance is essential.

bio:
❤️ Author. TEDx Speaker. Podcaster.
Mindset, confidence & self-trust
📖 Author of Give Yourself Permission
descripcion:
I’ve been rethinking what “good communication” actually means.

For a long time, I thought it meant being articulate, having the right words, knowing how to explain things clearly.
And those things matter… but not as much as I thought.

What matters more is something else entirely:
How well you actually listen.

Not just waiting your turn.
Not just gathering information.
But being fully present with what and who is in front of you.

That’s when communication changes.
Conversations go deeper.
People open up differently.
Things start to move that didn’t before.

It almost feels like magic.

#communication #communicationskills #selfawarenessjourney #personalgrowth #socialskills
